Hameln can work as a Support for Mouchette, Lotan doesn't work as she's also a DPS so that she'll be eating away at your resources which is even worse since it looks like she isn't even invested in much either and Tulu typically wants to be in a Team with other Aequor Units such as GMurphy & Myriam

You can optionally sub out either Hameln or Ramona for Aigis

No big map where you go around beating up mobs & elites until you reach the boss
im doing one uh lvl per day (not chap, lvl ig), and at this rate it will take me a few weeks to catch up to you
Instead, you're facing everything in waves
i kinda like skipping mobs and elites and going directly to boss
oh, cool, interesting
It also feels very off putting not having access to D - Stores & Junctions to buy Relics / Rouses & Heal / Rouse respectively

Oh, so half the game mechanic is gone?
It feels so much more rewarding
Doing the big map with mobs & elites before reaching the boss most of the time

need help with A5W4
i've been using the Lemurian team but the most I get is this far
the only +12 wheel I have is Titan's Blade so far, any tips?
you need to kill the mobs with abyss order/goli exalt on turn 3
ideally not play any marked cards
and basically do a single burst to kill turn 6=7
u never want the mobs alive
hmmm the mobs have a shitload of hp though, abyss order ain't killing them for me
use your over exalt turn 1
scale up tentacle dmg
turn 2
or turn 1
OE on who?
rouse gmurphy turn 1
gmurphy
use her waltz for blue stance
probably run 2
rouse miryam turn 2(do not use until 0 cost for turn 3), that way u give vuln for the mobs
so I shouldn't save up waltzes for red stance turn?
no otherwise ur abyss order will do 0 dmg for turn 3
i see
and what if I don't have abyss order on turn 3
lol
well u are using tulu sr wheel
so u will have retain
huh? that's not on the wheel
yes it is
where?
SR
AH
you're right
the silver one, so I should keep abyss order until turn 3 using that?
basically
tbh i play gmurphy slightly different with a different posse
so i dont really even need the retain

i did see people clearing without that wheel
in that case how do you get rid of the mobs
i play with a targeted draw posse(castor posse or aurita) those force u to draw abyss hymm, so you will have a very very high likelihood of drawing abyss order
also goli exalt for me will kill but my goli is more built

stacking up sacrifice

cause i can also force draw to discard
